The lid includes a silicone seal and valve that provide a hermetic closure and allow efficient vacuuming of food when used with a vacuum pump that must be purchased. The material doesn't absorb odours or colour of food and allows an immediate overview of the contents. Vacuuming extends the freshness of food up to four times, reduces oxidation and preserves the taste and nutritional value of food. The STATUS Gastro lid can be used in the dishwasher and freezer. All materials are food safe and BPA free. The lid is made in Slovenia and comes with a 3-year warranty. It enables pre-preparation of food, storage of ingredients in larger quantities and safe transport of liquid food.
